QA-11 -001 LOW P3
Failed: Test qa11 visual regression desktop
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa11_visual_regression_desktop 🕐 2026-05-21 04:20:26 ⏱ 15.01s
📋 What this test was checking
Desktop 1280×720 — page must match its visual baseline — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en, EN homepage.
🧪 Test data used
params: [homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en, EN homepage]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Use these parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en, EN homepage
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Desktop 1280×720 — page must match its visual baseline.
✗ What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
